title: F*ckin' Fred : Comme un Léopard
overview: One of the most iconic characters of Jonathan Cohen, F*ckin' Fred, makes his return after being created in the 2020 Orelsan's Epilogue Tour where Jonathan was a surprise guest.  This epic documentary will tell how F*ckin' Fred was created but also his journey through the first official Fuckin' Fred concert.
